Alexander Bernhardsson.note: Sweden's direct runner, useful for stretching the right side and turning loose transitions into pressure.
Alexander Bernhardsson.noteZh: 亚历山大·伯恩哈德松是瑞典的直接冲刺点，能拉开右路并把转换中的散落机会变成压力。

Alexander Isak.note: Sweden's reference striker, able to glide away from markers and turn half-chances into calm finishes.
Alexander Isak.noteZh: 亚历山大·伊萨克是瑞典的核心中锋，能优雅摆脱盯防并把半机会冷静转化为进球。

Anthony Elanga.note: Sweden's transition accelerator, dangerous when he can attack space before the back line is set.
Anthony Elanga.noteZh: 安东尼·埃兰加是瑞典的转换加速器，在防线站稳前冲击空间时很危险。

Benjamin Nygren.note: Sweden's flexible attacking connector, able to drift wide, combine inside, and arrive late near goal.
Benjamin Nygren.noteZh: 本杰明·尼格伦是瑞典灵活的进攻连接者，能拉到边路、内收配合，并后插上到门前。

Besfort Zeneli.note: Sweden's young midfield carrier, useful for escaping pressure and keeping quick moves alive.
Besfort Zeneli.noteZh: 贝斯福特·泽内利是瑞典年轻的中场推进者，适合摆脱压力并延续快速进攻。

Carl Starfelt.note: Sweden's experienced centre-back, valuable for aerial control and steady defending when games get direct.
Carl Starfelt.noteZh: 卡尔·斯塔费尔特是瑞典经验型中卫，在比赛变得直接时能提供空中控制和稳定防守。

Daniel Svensson.note: Sweden's left-side hybrid, able to support midfield possession or push forward from full-back zones.
Daniel Svensson.noteZh: 丹尼尔·斯文松是瑞典左路混合型球员，能支援中场控球，也能从边后卫区域前插。

Elliot Stroud.note: Sweden's left-side width option, giving the team running power and sharper crossing angles from deep.
Elliot Stroud.noteZh: 埃利奥特·斯特劳德是瑞典左路宽度选择，能从较深位置带来跑动力和更好的传中角度。

Eric Smith.summary: Eric Smith is a Sweden centre-back at St. Pauli who gives the national team defensive midfield cover, back-line calm, and long passing.
Eric Smith.note: Sweden's calm defensive passer, useful when they need a centre-back who can also protect midfield space.
Eric Smith.noteZh: 埃里克·史密斯是瑞典冷静的防守传球手，球队需要能兼顾中卫和中场保护的人时很有用。

Gabriel Gudmundsson.note: Sweden's left-back stabilizer, bringing recovery speed and enough forward support to balance the flank.
Gabriel Gudmundsson.noteZh: 加布里埃尔·古德蒙松是瑞典左后卫稳定点，能带来回追速度和足够的前插支援来平衡边路。

Gustaf Lagerbielke.summary: Gustaf Lagerbielke is a Sweden centre-back at Braga who gives the national team aerial defending, duel strength, and back-line depth.
Gustaf Lagerbielke.note: Sweden's aerial centre-back option, useful for defending crosses and attacking restarts at the other end.
Gustaf Lagerbielke.noteZh: 古斯塔夫·拉格比尔克是瑞典空中型中卫选择，适合防守传中并在另一端冲击定位球。

Gustaf Nilsson.summary: Gustaf Nilsson is a Sweden centre-forward at Club Brugge who gives the national team hold-up play, aerial presence, and penalty-box depth.
Gustaf Nilsson.note: Sweden's physical striker depth, valuable when they want a target for crosses and second balls.
Gustaf Nilsson.noteZh: 古斯塔夫·尼尔松是瑞典身体型中锋深度，球队需要传中目标和第二落点时很有价值。

Herman Johansson.note: Sweden's energetic right-back option, giving the flank recovery work and steady overlap support.
Herman Johansson.noteZh: 赫尔曼·约翰松是瑞典充满活力的右后卫选择，能给边路带来回追和稳定套边支援。

Hjalmar Ekdal.note: Sweden's reliable centre-back cover, suited to compact defending and long spells without the ball.
Hjalmar Ekdal.noteZh: 亚尔马尔·埃克达尔是瑞典可靠的中卫保障，适合紧凑防守和长时间无球阶段。

Isak Hien.note: Sweden's aggressive centre-back, strong stepping into duels and quick enough to clean up behind him.
Isak Hien.noteZh: 伊萨克·希恩是瑞典主动型中卫，擅长前顶对抗，也有速度清理身后空间。

Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.note: Sweden's goalkeeper depth, giving them size, reflexes, and a confident penalty-area presence.
Jacob Widell Zetterstrom.noteZh: 雅各布·维德尔·泽特斯特伦是瑞典门将深度选择，带来身材、反应和自信的禁区存在感。

Jesper Karlstrom.note: Sweden's midfield worker, useful for collecting second balls and keeping possession from getting loose.
Jesper Karlstrom.noteZh: 耶斯佩尔·卡尔斯特伦是瑞典中场工兵，适合争第二落点并避免控球变得松散。

Ken Sema.note: Sweden's experienced left-side option, able to defend as a wing-back and still deliver from wide areas.
Ken Sema.noteZh: 肯·塞马是瑞典经验丰富的左路选择，能像翼卫一样防守，也能从边路送出传中。

Kristoffer Nordfeldt.note: Sweden's veteran goalkeeper cover, trusted for calm decisions and steady shot-stopping depth.
Kristoffer Nordfeldt.noteZh: 克里斯托弗·诺德费尔特是瑞典资深门将保障，能带来冷静决策和稳定扑救深度。

Lucas Bergvall.note: Sweden's high-ceiling midfield talent, able to carry forward and add imagination between the lines.
Lucas Bergvall.noteZh: 卢卡斯·贝里瓦尔是瑞典上限很高的中场天才，能向前带球并在线间增加想象力。

Mattias Svanberg.note: Sweden's two-way midfielder, useful for balancing possession with late runs and shooting threat.
Mattias Svanberg.noteZh: 马蒂亚斯·斯万贝里是瑞典双向中场，能用后插上和射门威胁平衡控球。

Taha Ali.note: Sweden's dribbling spark, capable of changing the tempo with a direct carry from the left.
Taha Ali.noteZh: 塔哈·阿里是瑞典的盘带火花，能从左路直接带球改变比赛节奏。

Victor Lindelof.note: Sweden's defensive leader, still central to organizing the line and passing out calmly.
Victor Lindelof.noteZh: 维克托·林德洛夫是瑞典防守领袖，仍然是组织防线和冷静出球的核心。

Viktor Gyokeres.note: Sweden's power striker, able to carry through contact and finish chances before defenders settle.
Viktor Gyokeres.noteZh: 维克托·哲凯赖什是瑞典力量型中锋，能带球穿过对抗并在后卫站稳前完成终结。

Viktor Johansson.note: Sweden's in-form goalkeeper option, bringing reflex saves and clear command when the box gets crowded.
Viktor Johansson.noteZh: 维克托·约翰松是瑞典状态出色的门将选择，禁区拥挤时能带来反应扑救和清晰指挥。

Yasin Ayari.note: Sweden's progressive midfield carrier, useful for escaping pressure and supporting attacks around the box.
Yasin Ayari.noteZh: 亚辛·阿亚里是瑞典推进型中场，适合摆脱压力并在禁区周围支援进攻。
